positive: A highly detailed, stylized arrangement of celestial botanical elements. Central composition featuring bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate constellations, crescent moons, and exotic jungle foliage. The style should be a blend of neo-whimsical illustration and elegant botanical etching, utilizing clean linework and strong, deep contrast. Palette limited to midnight blue, burnt gold, and forest emerald green. Perfect silhouette for apparel printing, designed with negative space emphasis, symmetrical radial arrangement, intricate linework, high contrast, vibrant graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, low resolution, grainy, low detail, muddy colors
